/usr/bin/c++ -DSDL_ENABLE_OLD_NAMES=1 -O3 -DNDEBUG -O2 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/TileMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/LevelLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/TextRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/LevelSelect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/PlayerController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/AssetPath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/LevelManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/GameSupport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/CrashReporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/FrontendMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/AudioSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/platformer.dir/src/ParallaxRenderer.cpp.o -o platformer  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL3_image.so.0.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL3_ttf.so.0.2.2 /usr/local/lib/libSDL3_mixer.so.0.1.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/local/lib/libSDL3.so.0.4.1
